name: kan
compose:
name: slashnode-kan
services:
  migrate:
    image: ghcr.io/kanbn/kan-migrate:0.5.6
    container_name: kan-migrate
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      POSTGRES_URL: postgresql://kanuser:kanpassword@kan-db:5432/kan?sslmode=disable
  server:
    image: ghcr.io/kanbn/kan:0.5.6
    container_name: kan-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - db
    environment:
      NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:8373
      BETTER_AUTH_SECRET: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      POSTGRES_URL: postgresql://kanuser:kanpassword@kan-db:5432/kan?sslmode=disable
      NEXT_PUBLIC_ALLOW_CREDENTIALS: 'true'
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8373:3000
  db:
    image: postgres:17.3
    container_name: kan-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: kan
      POSTGRES_USER: kanuser
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: kanpassword
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/postgresql/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-kan_db_data-db
